도란 구마유시 너무좋다 진짜 도란아 잘왔어
Doran has quickly grown on me. I was dubious about losing Z. I feel like he will fit in well with the team next season, though.
황란이 왜케 티원이랑 잘어울리지 ㅋ ㅋ ㅋ ㅋ ㅋ

Guma making good on his promise to take him around despite the tight schedule!🫶🏻🫶🏻🫶🏻

The chef taking the time to reassure Doran of better dishes ahead (the chef is assessing already how he will make Doran eat more, eat better and gain more already,😂).

Happy to see how they are enfolding him in the T1 embrace this much to make him at ease with the transition.🫶🏻👏🏻👍🏻

Its going to be a tough 2025 LOL season..changes in the game were announced by Riot (T1 was especially called out due to their clutch and game winning baron sneaks, plus the addition could have been Riot's answer to the lane swap strategy too). LCK's roster just became more stacked with the returnees from other leagues added (which is great as this would mean quality matches in the region=better prep against the other regions).

Doran came to T1 in such fanfare...sincere T1 fans...protect this new top laner...tempered expectations should always be at the back of each game. A win for me in this regard is to see the incremental integration and build of chemistry...I hope his former ties with Keria and Guma would help a lot...and Faker's experience in having to adjust to a new team member and  make it work should ease the burden as well..and having twin Hyun joon sitting next to each other will add to the circus,😂

Remember: good karma begets good karma. T1 fanbase knows this more than anyone else when good deeds are the ones that made it as the best way to support the team in their toughest challenges.

Dopeguke/Hyunpegoke era is on its way!🐿🐯🐱🐻🐶
